description_long: This guard rail consists of a rectangular metal frame with five evenly spaced horizontal bars and two vertical posts at each end. The structure is constructed from round tubular steel, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. The horizontal rails are welded to the vertical posts, providing a continuous barrier with minimal gaps. The ends of the posts appear to have mounting features for secure attachment to the ground or another structure. The surface is finished in a uniform black color, likely powder-coated for durability and corrosion resistance. There are no visible reflective markings or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function as a safety barrier.
description: A black, tubular steel guard rail with five horizontal bars and two vertical posts, designed for robust safety and separation in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, five horizontal bars, and two vertical posts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and round tubular construction of the rail.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the horizontal bars and posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and end mounting features.
